creator: julian@mehnle.net
text:
I have apache-2.2.16_1 and openssl-1.0.0_2 installed, which should be capable of supporting TLS Name Server Indication (SNI).

http://wiki.apache.org/httpd/NameBasedSSLVHostsWithSNI

However, when I add the "SSLStrictSNIVHostCheck" directive to my httpd.conf and restart Apache, it says:

  SSLStrictSNIVHostCheck failed; OpenSSL is not built with support for TLS extensions and SNI indication. Refer to the documentation, and build a compatible version of OpenSSL.

Could you please enable the necessary build flags to support SNI?
